hooks.name: maestro-session-start
hooks.description: Initialize Maestro workspace state directory for the session

hooks.name: maestro-model-override
hooks.description: Reserved for future config overrides — model overrides only work via parallel dispatch --model flag

hooks.name: maestro-before-agent
hooks.description: Inject session context into agent turns

hooks.name: maestro-after-agent
hooks.description: Validate handoff report format with retry on malformed output

hooks.name: maestro-session-end-exit
hooks.description: Clean up temporary state files on exit

hooks.name: maestro-session-end-logout
hooks.description: Clean up temporary state files on logout
